summary: Iteration 22 - All new features tested and verified. 10/10 backend tests passed. Fixed minor bug in expert-services/book endpoint (enterprise_id None -> empty string). Wishlist heart button bug fix verified working on both ServiceProductCard and ServiceProductDetailPage.

minor.issue: enterprise_id was None for non-enterprise users causing Stripe metadata validation error
minor.status: FIXED - changed None to empty string

seed_data_creation: TEST_Recommandation activity post created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 22 features verified: 1) Certifications system with 4 types (quality, eco, expert, premium_partner) - GET /api/certifications returns all, POST /api/enterprise/certifications/apply creates Stripe checkout, 2) Expert services with 4 types - GET /api/expert-services returns all, POST /api/expert-services/book creates Stripe checkout, 3) Client invoices - GET /api/client/invoices aggregates orders/subscriptions/trainings, 4) Activity posts - POST /api/client/activity-post creates public posts for friends feed, 5) Order fees verified: subtotal, transaction_fee (2.9%), management_fee (10%), 6) Investment commission verified: 12% on returns, 7) Wishlist bug fix verified: titelli_token used correctly, no React errors

certifications.GET /api/certifications: PASS - returns 4 certification types with prices
certifications.POST /api/enterprise/certifications/appl: PASS - creates real Stripe checkout URL

expert_services.POST /api/expert-services/book: PASS - creates real Stripe checkout URL (after fix)

client_invoices.GET /api/client/invoices: PASS - returns invoices from orders, subscriptions, trainings

wishlist_bug_fix.ServiceProductCard: PASS - heart button works, no React errors
wishlist_bug_fix.ServiceProductDetailPage: PASS - Favoris button works, toggles state
